name: Yi Jinn Industrial Co., Ltd.
summary: Yi Jinn Industrial Co., Ltd. engages in the research and development, production, and sale of polyester textured yarns worldwide. It primarily offers polyester filament yarns, polyester/nylon textured yarns, spandex air covering yarns, polyester textured color yarns, and composite yarns, as well as man-made woven and knit fabrics. The company provides its products under the Seagull and GreenGuard brands for application in shirts, suits, sportswear, casual wear, women's suits, home textiles, leisure wears, bath towels, facecloths, stuffed toys, ladies garments'/spring and summer clothes, gentleman's clothes/pants, knitted and woven fabrics, socks, denim fabrics, yoga clothes, underwear's/lingerie's, jackets, and over coats, as well as for weaving, and warp or circular knitting. Yi Jinn Industrial Co., Ltd. was founded in 1981 and is headquartered in Taipei City, Taiwan.
